I have an xUnit v3 project with several test classes. I need to run only the Smoke tests from classes whose name contains 'Integration' — I want a single combined filter expression for dotnet test rather than separate flags.

input.initialPrompt: I have an xUnit v3 project with several test classes. I need to run only the Smoke tests from classes whose name contains 'Integration' — I want a single combined filter expression for dotnet test rather than separate flags.

data.reasoningText:
The user wants to run only Smoke tests from classes whose name contains 'Integration' using a single combined filter expression for `dotnet test`. This is about the `--filter` option in `dotnet test`.

In dotnet test, you can combine filter expressions using `&` (AND), `|` (OR), and parentheses. For xUnit v3, the filter uses:

- `FullyQualifiedName` - the full name of the test
- `DisplayName` - the display name
- `Category` / `Trait` - for traits

For filtering by class name containing "Integration" and by trait/category "Smoke", the combined filter expression would be:


```
dotnet test --filter "ClassName~Integration & Category=Smoke"
```

This uses `ClassName~Integration` to match any class name containing "Integration" and `Category=Smoke` to filter for tests marked with the Smoke trait, combining them with the AND operator.

data.content:
Use a single `--filter` expression combining both conditions with `&`:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Integration & Category=Smoke"
```

This matches tests where:
- **`FullyQualifiedName~Integration`** — the fully-qualified name contains "Integration" (covers `PaymentGatewayIntegrationTests` and `OrderIntegrationTests`)
- **`Category=Smoke`** — the `[Trait("Category", "Smoke")]` attribute is present

So it will run these three tests:
- `ProcessPayment_ValidCard_Succeeds`
- `RefundPayment_ValidTransaction_Succeeds`
- `PlaceOrder_ValidItems_CreatesOrder`

It excludes `PaymentValidationTests.ValidateCard_ExpiredDate_ReturnsFalse` (Smoke but not in an "Integration" class) and the Regression tests.
